---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of what you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed JSON API change (if any)

Show how the input or output JSON would look with the proposed feature.

## Does this require a change in the eMudhra eSign SDK?

- [ ] Yes — link the SDK issue/feature here
- [ ] No — it can be handled entirely in this bridge
